codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers feature requirements. Three files modified: grounded-search.ts (query composition), run-discovery.ts (warning suppression logic), routing-enforcement.test.ts (3 new tests). No blocking issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Implementation correctly follows AGENTS.md guidance items #17 and #18: 'In unrestricted grounded mode, search prompt/query construction must be intent-modifier-driven' and 'Do not emit misleading no companies configured warnings for valid unrestricted runs when non-blank intent modifiers are present'. No convention violations detected.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grounded-search.ts:220-225 pushes 'Search focus: Modifier-driven intent search (no fixed company target)' for unrestricted scope; run-discovery.ts:162-168 conditionally suppresses warning based on hasNonBlankModifierIntent check.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed discovery-integration-worker SKILL.md procedure correctly. skillFeedback.followedProcedure is true with no deviations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows tests added first (VAL-ROUTE-010, VAL-ROUTE-011), then implementation, then verification commands. All npm validators passed.

summary: Pass. Feature implementation correctly composes grounded query from modifiers (targetRoles, keywordsInclude, locations, remotePolicy, seniority) when company.name is empty, replacing placeholder company artifacts. Added hasNonBlankModifierIntent helper to detect valid modifier intent and suppress misleading 'No companies configured' warnings when grounded execution can proceed. Three new tests (VAL-ROUTE-010, VAL-ROUTE-011a, VAL-ROUTE-011b) verify the behavior. All expected behaviors covered.
